videoSnippet.title: Simply ELITE || Vincent vs Jorden || Super Chess Classic Romania 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Keymer, Vincent (2759) - Van Foreest, Jorden (2735)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Chess Classic Romania 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.05.23
B51 Sicilian, Canal-Sokolsky (Nimzovich-Rossolimo, Moscow) attack

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.Bb5+ Nd7 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.O-O a6 6.c4 g6 7.Nc3 Bg7 8.h3 O-O 9.d3 Ne5 10.Nxe5 dxe5 11.a3 Nh5 12.Be3 Nf4 13.Qd2 Ne6 14.b4 Nd4 15.bxc5 Qa5 16.Nd5 Qxa4 17.Bxd4 exd4 18.Nb6 Qc6 19.Nxa8 Qxc5 20.Qb4 Qh5 21.Qxe7 Bxh3 22.gxh3 Qxh3 23.Qg5 Rxa8 24.Qg3 Qd7 25.a4 Rc8 26.f4 Rc5 27.e5 Qf5 28.Kg2 Qd7 29.Qh3 Qc7 30.Qf3 Bf8 31.Qe4 Qd7 32.Qf3 Rc6 33.Ra2 Rb6 34.Rff2 a5 35.f5 gxf5 36.Qxf5 Qe8 37.Rae2 Bh6 38.e6 fxe6 39.Qg4+ Qg6 40.Qxg6+ hxg6 41.Rb2 Rb4 42.Rxb4 axb4 43.c5 Bf8 44.c6 bxc6 45.a5 Bc5 46.Rb2

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:05 MVL vs Fabi
03:00 Game Starts!
13:30 IWITP!
15:00 FINAL STANDINGS
16:50 Legends Of The Channel
17:00 First Link in the Description!
